title: OpenClaw Failure Containment
objective: Inject bad plugin/provider/runtime conditions and verify OpenClaw reports useful diagnostics without taking down the gateway.

phases.title: Baseline Gateway
phases.intent: Start from a clean gateway before injecting failure conditions.

phases.title: Diagnostic Capture
phases.intent: Capture logs and status after injected failures. Scenario-specific injectors will be added as Kova grows.
